title: phaeneilema gardneri
intro: Phaeneilema gardneri is a plant species commonly known as the 'Himalayan Ironwort' or 'Himalayan Rock Jasmine', belonging to the family Glomeraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including antidiabetic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can aid in the prevention of chronic diseases such as diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. Herbal preparations of Phaeneilema gardneri can be found in various forms, including extracts, capsules, and teas, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
